title: Patient Mood Scores

text.subtitleLine1: Average mood scores improve consistently in waiting areas and
text.subtitleLine2: corridors through 2023 following public art installations.

render_script:
d3.select("body")
  .style("margin", "0")
  .style("font-family", source_data.fontFamily)
  .style("display", "flex")
  .style("justify-content", "center")
  .style("align-items", "flex-start");

const svg = d3.select("body")
  .append("svg")
  .attr("width", source_data.width)
  .attr("height", source_data.height)
  .attr("viewBox", `0 0 ${source_data.width} ${source_data.height}`);

svg.append("rect")
  .attr("x", 0)
  .attr("y", 0)
  .attr("width", source_data.width)
  .attr("height", source_data.height)
  .attr("fill", source_data.background);

const { width, data, text, layout, styles } = source_data;
const centerX = width / 2;
const leftBarEndX = centerX - layout.centerGap / 2;
const rightBarStartX = centerX + layout.centerGap / 2;
const maxValue = d3.max(data, (d) => Math.max(d.waitingArea, d.corridor));
const xScale = d3.scaleLinear().domain([0, maxValue]).range([0, layout.maxBarWidth]);

const legendGroup = svg.append("g");
legendGroup
  .append("rect")
  .attr("x", layout.leftLegendX)
  .attr("y", layout.legendY)
  .attr("width", layout.legendBoxSize)
  .attr("height", layout.legendBoxSize)
  .attr("fill", styles.leftBar.fill);
legendGroup
  .append("text")
  .attr("x", layout.leftLegendX + layout.legendTextOffset)
  .attr("y", layout.legendY + layout.legendBoxSize - 1)
  .attr("fill", styles.legend.textFill)
  .style("font-size", styles.legend.fontSize)
  .style("font-weight", styles.legend.fontWeight)
  .text(text.leftLegend);
legendGroup
  .append("rect")
  .attr("x", layout.rightLegendX)
  .attr("y", layout.legendY)
  .attr("width", layout.legendBoxSize)
  .attr("height", layout.legendBoxSize)
  .attr("fill", styles.rightBar.fill);
legendGroup
  .append("text")
  .attr("x", layout.rightLegendX + layout.legendTextOffset)
  .attr("y", layout.legendY + layout.legendBoxSize - 1)
  .attr("fill", styles.legend.textFill)
  .style("font-size", styles.legend.fontSize)
  .style("font-weight", styles.legend.fontWeight)
  .text(text.rightLegend);

const rows = svg.append("g");
data.forEach((d, i) => {
  const y = layout.chartTop + i * (layout.barHeight + layout.rowGap);
  const leftWidth = xScale(d.waitingArea);
  const rightWidth = xScale(d.corridor);
  const leftX = leftBarEndX - leftWidth;

  rows
    .append("rect")
    .attr("x", leftX)
    .attr("y", y)
    .attr("width", leftWidth)
    .attr("height", layout.barHeight)
    .attr("fill", styles.leftBar.fill);
  rows
    .append("rect")
    .attr("x", rightBarStartX)
    .attr("y", y)
    .attr("width", rightWidth)
    .attr("height", layout.barHeight)
    .attr("fill", styles.rightBar.fill);
  rows
    .append("text")
    .attr("x", leftX - layout.valueLabelOffset)
    .attr("y", y + layout.monthLabelYOffset)
    .attr("text-anchor", "end")
    .attr("fill", styles.valueLabel.fill)
    .style("font-size", styles.valueLabel.fontSize)
    .style("font-weight", styles.valueLabel.fontWeight)
    .text(d.waitingArea % 1 === 0 ? d.waitingArea.toFixed(0) : d.waitingArea.toFixed(1));
  rows
    .append("text")
    .attr("x", centerX)
    .attr("y", y + layout.monthLabelYOffset)
    .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
    .attr("fill", styles.monthLabel.fill)
    .style("font-size", styles.monthLabel.fontSize)
    .style("font-weight", styles.monthLabel.fontWeight)
    .text(d.month);
  rows
    .append("text")
    .attr("x", rightBarStartX + rightWidth + layout.valueLabelOffset)
    .attr("y", y + layout.monthLabelYOffset)
    .attr("text-anchor", "start")
    .attr("fill", styles.valueLabel.fill)
    .style("font-size", styles.valueLabel.fontSize)
    .style("font-weight", styles.valueLabel.fontWeight)
    .text(d.corridor % 1 === 0 ? d.corridor.toFixed(0) : d.corridor.toFixed(1));
});

const title = svg
  .append("text")
  .attr("x", centerX)
  .attr("y", layout.titleY)
  .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
  .attr("fill", styles.title.fill)
  .style("font-size", styles.title.fontSize)
  .style("font-weight", styles.title.fontWeight);
title.append("tspan").attr("x", centerX).attr("dy", 0).text(text.titleLine1);
title.append("tspan").attr("x", centerX).attr("dy", styles.title.lineHeight).text(text.titleLine2);

const subtitle = svg
  .append("text")
  .attr("x", centerX)
  .attr("y", layout.subtitleY)
  .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
  .attr("fill", styles.subtitle.fill)
  .style("font-size", styles.subtitle.fontSize)
  .style("font-weight", styles.subtitle.fontWeight);
subtitle.append("tspan").attr("x", centerX).attr("dy", 0).text(text.subtitleLine1);
subtitle.append("tspan").attr("x", centerX).attr("dy", styles.subtitle.lineHeight).text(text.subtitleLine2);
